title: Validate T-Deck ST7789 display node parameters
description: Verify the disabled Zephyr ST7789/MIPI-DBI node parameters for the LilyGO T-Deck panel before enabling display support. Confirm width/height, orientation, offsets, ST7789 init values, mipi-max-frequency, reset absence, DC GPIO11, BL GPIO42, and LVGL/display chosen-node requirements against LilyGO/Meshtastic source and physical boot logs. Acceptance: app overlay can enable display without LoRa CS interference; visual smoke confirms orientation/colors/backlight; any panel revision differences become board/overlay follow-ups.
